item.name: Longnose Gar
item.description:
This streamlined species is adept at cutting through the waters. Unfortunately for the fish, its aerodynamic form has invited some novel uses over the years.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: When dried, the long nose of this predator hardens and shrinks to a sharp point. Scholars have traced the origins of the popular pastime “darts” to a rather more rudimentary game─one which saw contestants hurling the desiccated carcasses of these fish like javelins.
